name: RABBIT-CAGE-6
title: bug-filing scripts route all bugs to global .claude/docs/bugs/ instead of per-feature bugs_root
description: file-bug.sh defaults BUG_ROOT to .claude/docs/bugs/ and does not consult feature.json:bugs_root even when --related-feature is supplied. Three legacy bugs still exist at .claude/docs/bugs/ (BUG-FILING-1, HARD-RULES-1, INSTALL-DISTRIBUTE-1). Per design, each feature's bugs go under its own bugs_root (e.g. .claude/features/install-distribute/docs/bugs/). The test suite uses a synthetic BUG_ROOT and never tests per-feature routing. Spec also still describes the global model.
